recommended_pattern: A coherent brand world expressed through a restrained visual system, signature imagery, and a small set of meaningful paths into the company.

decision_rules.if_luxury: Use material, pace, and image restraint to signal value; keep interaction timing calm and intentional.
decision_rules.if_heritage: Connect historical evidence to the present offer instead of relying on nostalgic decoration alone.
decision_rules.if_multi_audience: Offer clearly named routes for each audience without collapsing the home page into a feature grid.

anti_patterns: A generic SaaS feature grid pasted onto a world-building brief.
Stock imagery that could belong to any competitor.
A primary CTA repeated so aggressively that the brand loses its point of view.
